Martin Luther King Jr Memorial, Wall St, Binghamton, NY 13901, USA

Doubletree hotel property parking lot's southwest corner, ~3-5 trees, very productive, many bunches can be reached by hand standing on sidewalk's short stone wall. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
There are usually a lot of apples that fall in the street here in the fall. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
